achievements: Complete infrastructure migration from Digital Ocean to AWS
Full backend overhaul improving performance and security
project.description: Migrated Chanced.com from Digital Ocean to AWS and performed a complete overhaul of their PHP Laravel backend. The project modernized the hosting infrastructure and improved application performance and reliability.
project.title: Digital Ocean to AWS Migration & Backend Overhaul
project.technicalApproach: Migrated hosting from Digital Ocean to AWS. Overhauled the entire PHP Laravel backend for improved performance, security, and maintainability. Leveraged AWS services for hosting, storage, and compute.

matchedRequirements: Provide at least 3 references within the past 5 years of clients for whom comparable services have been performed including client names, addresses, telephone numbers, email addresses, explanation of services, and project start and end dates

achievements: Secure, localized trading platform with CMS-driven content
Automated CI/CD pipeline with Azure Pipelines
Global performance optimization with Cloudflare CDN
project.description: Built a secure cryptocurrency trading platform frontend with dynamic, localized content. The platform features server-side rendering, CMS-driven content management, and CDN optimization for global performance.
project.title: Secure Crypto Trading Platform
project.technicalApproach: Developed the frontend using Next.js with Strapi CMS for dynamic content management. Set up CI/CD with Azure Pipelines for automated deployments. Applied Cloudflare optimizations for global performance and security.

achievements: High-performance web application with server-side rendering
project.description: Created a performant front-end for an Amplify-hosted web application using Next.js. The platform features server-side rendering for optimal performance and is deployed on AWS Amplify for streamlined hosting and CI/CD.
project.title: Performant Web Application on AWS Amplify
project.technicalApproach: Built the application with Next.js and TypeScript, leveraging server-side rendering for performance. Deployed on AWS Amplify with integrated hosting and continuous deployment pipelines.

achievements: Full multitenant HR platform supporting multiple organizations
Integrated video interviewing and resume parsing capabilities
Streamlined candidate workflows from application to hire
project.description: Built a multitenant human resources application that integrates video interviewing, resume parsing, and candidate workflows. The platform supports multiple organizations on a single deployment with tenant isolation, enabling end-to-end recruitment process automation.
project.title: Multitenant HR Platform with Video Interviewing
project.technicalApproach: Developed a React-based frontend with AWS serverless backend. Integrated video interviewing capabilities, AI-powered resume parsing, and candidate workflow management. Built with multi-tenancy support for organizational isolation.

achievements: Automated translation of safety manuals from German to multiple languages
Eliminated manual translation and formatting workflows
Maintained document formatting integrity across languages
project.description: Built an automated transcription and translation system for safety manuals, converting German-language PDF articles into every required country-specific language. The platform ingests PDFs, extracts text, translates content, and regenerates formatted PDF output.
project.title: Multilingual Safety Manual Translation Platform
project.technicalApproach: Used Amazon Textract to extract text from PDF safety manuals. Integrated Amazon Translate for multilingual conversion. Built an automated pipeline to reconvert translated text back into formatted PDF documents.

criticalGaps: Provide eCitation Systems including mobile and desktop apps and sync service for 40 users

Provide Court Export Module
Provide interface to output citation records to RMS (RIMS)

Provide interface to output collision records to RMS (RIMS)

Compatible with Sun Ridge Systems RIMS CAD System
Compatible with Crossroads Software Report Writer for collision reporting (being utilized through Countywide grant project)
Vendor's desktop application client, if applicable, must be compatible with Windows 10 Pro
Provide 6 mobile printers if offered, or ability to purchase separately, along with PM service and supplies cost
Provide required citation data to Justice, Circuit, and Municipal courts in a timely manner
Provide reporting capability for mandatory state reporting
Enable access to citation and crash data/information from one source
Provide cost for additional subscriptions as the department expands in personnel
Provide cost of upgrades for all systems when available
Provide project management and training for all systems including installation and training
Provide annual maintenance and support for all systems with recurring annual cost for the next five years

Provide detailed implementation plan describing project management methods, controls, stakeholder engagement methodology, and implementation strategies
Have at least five (5) years of experience within the past five (5) years under a legally registered business name in providing services of similar type and scope
Have not filed for bankruptcy under any business name over the past five (5) years
Must have an active SAM.gov account in good standing and provide SAM.gov Unique Entity ID number upon proposal submission
Must be registered on OpenGov and download the solicitation to appear on the Prospective Bidders List
Must acknowledge all addenda electronically via the City's Bidding Website
Must comply with all grant requirements per the RFP, attachments, and addenda including Title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and Highway Safety Grant Programs
Must be able to meet all grant requirements and provide support to City staff with grant management
Must not be on the CA Debarment List

Cyber Insurance coverage is required in addition to the insurance requirements within the sample agreement
Provide evidence of insurance in the coverage and amounts listed in the Sample Agreement
Furnish Certificates of Insurance within ten (10) consecutive calendar days of award of contract
Company and/or key personnel shall hold appropriate license for the discipline and services if applicable
Must possess valid City of Banning Business License throughout the term of the contract
Proposals shall be firm offers and may not be withdrawn for a period of 120 days following the submission deadline
Complete and submit Certification Regarding Debarment, Suspension, Ineligibility Form (Attachment C)
Complete and submit Certification Compliance document
Complete and submit New Vendor Packet

Identify major subcontractors if any and their degree of involvement, including how long the Company has worked with the subcontractor
Include affirmative statement that proposer and all assigned key professional staff are properly licensed to practice in California
Pricing must remain firm for the initial contract term

Identify any litigation, mediation, or arbitration regarding performance of similar services in the past five years
